name: Multica
description: Open-source platform to manage AI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, …) as team members — assign tasks, track progress, reuse skills. This greffon hosts the Multica SERVER (web + API + Postgres); the agent daemon runs on your own machine and points at this instance.

value.title: JWT secret
value.description: Signs auth tokens. Generated by the platform at instance creation.
